name: Lyn
desc: A young girl from the Lorca tribe. Stouthhearted and kind.

name: Sain
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. A bit of a scoundrel.

name: Kent
desc: A knight in service to house Caelin. Virtuous to a fault.

name: Wil
desc: A youth from Pherae, in the Lycian League. Very social.

name: Dorcas
desc: A man from a small village in Bern. Fights for his wife.

name: Florina
desc: A pegasus knight earning her title. A friend of Lyn’s.

name: Rath
desc: A young hired sword from the Kutolah tribe.

name: Erk
desc: A young mage from Etruria. CHarming, but uptight.

name: Wallace
desc: A retired knight of Caelin. Constantly testing himself.

name: Eagler
desc: Knight Commander of Caelin

name: Nils
desc: A bard possessing arcane powers. Brother of Ninian.

name: Eliwood
desc: Marquess Pherae’s young son. Just and honourable.

name: Marcus
desc: A paladin serving House Pherae. A skilled veteran.

name: Lowen
desc: A knight in service to House Pherae. A fresh recruit.

name: Rebecca
desc: A youth from Pherae. Very helpful and bright.

name: Bartre
desc: One of Eliwood’s guardsmen. Duty is everything to him.

name: Hector
desc: Marquess Ostia’s younger brother. Reckless, but loyal.

name: Oswin
desc: A knight in service to House Ostia. Hector’s sworn man.

name: Serra
desc: A cleric in service to House Ostia. Headstrong and bold.

name: Matthew
desc: A cheery thief. His casual demeanor belies his skill.

name: Guy
desc: A youth from Sacae. Yearns to be a swordmaster.

name: Merlinus
desc: A traveling merchant. Timid and easily frightened.

name: Dart
desc: One of Fargus corsairs. Foulmouth, but kind.

name: Priscilla
desc: A vassal in service of Count Caerleon of Etruria.

name: Raven
desc: A troubled mercenary with  a grudge against House Ostia.

name: Lucius
desc: A travelling acolyte. Gentle and serene.

name: Isadora
desc: A paladin in the service of House Pherae. Modest and Polite.

name: Batta
desc: A Ganelon bandit. Called the Beast for this savagery.

name: Glass
desc: A Sacaen swordsman with a greedy heart.

name: Erik
desc: The son of Marquess Laus. Despises Eliwood and Hector.

name: Legault
desc: A former Black Fang once known as Hurricane.

name: Ninian
desc: A somber girl, but filled with a solemn energy.

name: Heath
desc: A deserter from Bern's wyvern riders. Prideful.

name: Karla
desc: A dedicated swordfighter. Cool and detached.

name: Zealot
desc: The lord of Edessa leading hte Ilia mercenary knights.

name: Juno
desc: A former dquad leader of Ilia`s pegasus knights. Zealot`s Wife.

name: Fiora
desc: Commander of the 5th wing of Ilias pegasus knights.

name: Pent
desc: Marquess of Reglay. Sole student of Archsage Athos.

name: Louise
desc: The wife of Marquess Reglay. A lethal beauty.

name: Karel
desc: An eastern swordmaster. Seeking worthy opponents.

name: Harken
desc: The sole survivor of the Knights of Pherae.

name: Douglas
desc: The great General of Etruria.

name: Canas
desc: A scholar, and a novice student of the ancient magics.

name: Hawkeye
desc: The protector of Nabata. A mysterious air surrounds him.

name: Geitz
desc: The eldest son opf a wealthy merchant. Finding himself.

name: Farina
desc: A member of the 3rd wing of Ilias Pegasus Knights

name: Nino
desc: One of the Black Fang. True and innocent.

name: Jaffar
desc: The Black Fangs Angel of Death. Once served Nergal.

name: Leila
desc: A spy in service of House Ostia.

name: Vaida
desc: A deserter from Berns wyvern riders. Brutal.

name: Renault
desc: A cleric wandering Valor. Shrouded in mystery.

name: Fargus
desc: A captain of a band of corsairs.

name: Uhai
desc: A senior member of the Black Fang, known as the soaring Hawk. Very just.

name: Lloyd
desc: The White Wolf of the Four Fangs. Brendans first son.

name: Linus
desc: Teh Rabid Hound of the Four Fangs. Brendans young son.

name: Athos
desc: An Archsage. One of the eight legendary Heroes.

name: Beyard
desc: A troop leader in Grado's army.

name: Breguet
desc: Commander of a Grado military force.

name: Heintz
desc: One of Bazba's henchmen.

name: Lundgren
desc: The emperor of Grado, resurrected by the power of the Dark Stone

name: Bazba
desc: The leader of Bazba's bandits.

name: Saar
desc: Commander of Grado's border guard. His loyalty is unshakable.

name: Selena
desc: One of Grado's generals. She's also known by the name Fluorspar.

name: Caellach
desc: An ambitious general in Grado's army. He's better known as Tiger Eye.

name: Valter
desc: A general in Grado's army. This cruel man is also known as Moonstone.

name: Riev
desc: A heretic and general in Grado's army. He's also known as Blood Beryl.

name: Lyon
desc: The prince of Grado. The Dark Stone is slowly corrupting his body.
